channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union launched a strike at seven of the company's delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Amazon workers to strike at multiple sites: Teamsters
item.description: The International Brotherhood of Teamsters union announced Amazon workers would strike starting Thursday in five confirmed states ahead of the Christmas holiday, citing the company’s absence from the bargaining negotiations as a reason.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: The first official trailer for James Gunn's Superman movie has been revealed, and I'm utterly obsessed with the DCU's take on Krypto the Superdog
item.description: The first trailer for James Gunn's Superman movie has taken flight, and it's got everyone talking about one very good boy in particular.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Thousands of GPS tracking customers have info leaked following data breach
item.description: A bug in Hapn's website is allegedly spilling sensitive information, while the company remains silent.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bernie Sanders blasts 'President Elon Musk' for derailing spending deal
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) took aim at tech mogul Elon Musk for saying any lawmaker supporting the newly unveiled end-of-the-year continuing resolution funding deal should be voted out of office. "Democrats and Republicans spent months negotiating a bipartisan agreement to fund our government.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Flipboard’s new app is a discovery engine for the decentralized web
item.description: Fourteen years ago, when the iPad was new and bursting with unfulfilled promise, an app called Flipboard debuted.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: GitHub launches free tier of Copilot AI coding assistant
item.description: GitHub has launched GitHub Copilot Free, providing access to a free tier of the AI-based pair programmer via Microsoft’s Visual Studio Code editor. Announced December 18, Copilot Free gives developers access to 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages monthly.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2
item.description: Army PEO C3N is obtaining industry feedback as part of its market research as it develops solicitations for the next generation command and control effort. The post Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple’s Craig Federighi is finding the practical side of AI
item.description: Few companies have the potential to get consumers hooked on AI like Apple. More than one billion people worldwide use an iPhone, and they’ll inevitably become acquainted with Apple Intelligence—the catch-all term for Apple’s suite of generative AI features—as they upgrade to a compatible device.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Meet the former Google and e-commerce exec building your doctor’s AI assistant
item.description: On average, a clinician spends two hours outside of office time writing patient notes. Healthcare startup Suki wants to give that time back to doctors via its AI platform that works as an assistant, helping generate notes and select billing codes.
item.dc:creator: Shalene Gupta, Fast Company

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: EPA grants California authority to ban sales of new gas cars by 2035. Action faces reversal by Trump
item.description: The California rule is stricter than a federal rule adopted this year that tightens emissions standards but does not require sales of electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: From CAPTCHA to catastrophe: How fake verification pages are spreading malware
item.description: CAPTCHAs, which are used by websites to confirm whether users are people or bots, are harmless, but hackers are using them to infect PCs with malware.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Gift of Fine-Tuned Technology: 12 Android Tips for a Smoother New Year
item.description: Boost your productivity with these 12 Android tips, covering future features, shortcuts, smart searching, and intelligent adjustments. Say goodbye to Android woes and hello to a smoother new year!
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: From surveillance to safety: How Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV is reshaping security
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies
item.description: The federal government is facing a massive tech talent shortage, particularly as the development and use of AI continues to gain traction. The post The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Equinix to end its bare-metal service
item.description: Hosting and colocation giant Equinix is sunsetting its bare-metal infrastructure-as-a-service (IaaS) offering by June 2026. New features will no longer be added to Equinix Metal, as the service was called.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI-powered deception: The sneaky macOS malware masquerading as your next video call
item.description: Artificial intelligence is making life easier for cybercriminals, allowing them to create elaborate scams to trick people. Kurt the Cyberguy explains how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
